tools.name: file_task
tools.description: File a new task into the board's triage inbox for a project. Worker + conductor. Returns the server-assigned id.

project.description: Target project (must be a live project).

acceptance.description: Acceptance criteria; each becomes an unchecked checkbox.

epic.description: Epic slug to file under; the epic must already exist (create_epic).

depends_on.description: Task ids this task depends on.

tools.name: append_log
tools.description: Append a logbook entry to the in-progress card owned by the calling session (resolved server-side; workers never handle a task id). Worker + conductor.

entry.description: Log line text; the server stamps time + session attribution.

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks on a project's board, optionally filtered by state and/or epic. Conductor.

tools.name: read_task
tools.description: Read a single task including its logbook (optionally only the last logTail entries). Conductor.

logTail.description: Keep only the last N logbook entries.

tools.name: read_log
tools.description: Read a task's logbook only, most-recent first, optionally capped at limit. Conductor.

tools.name: move_task
tools.description: Move a task between board states. Legal: triage->backlog/todo, backlog->todo, todo->in-progress, in-progress->done, plus corrective todo->backlog, in-progress->todo, done->in-progress. Sets owner when entering in-progress. Conductor.

owner.description: Session id to attribute as owner when moving to in-progress.

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Update task fields. `fields` may contain any of: title, goal, epic, priority, depends_on (other keys ignored). Conductor.

fields.description: Subset of {title, goal, epic, priority, depends_on}. Advertised as an opaque object (flat-schema constraint); validated at runtime.

tools.name: create_epic
tools.description: Create (or refresh title/goal of) a project-scoped epic. Conductor.

tools.name: list_epics
tools.description: List a project's epics with their computed per-state rollup. Conductor.

tools.name: read_epic
tools.description: Read an epic (goal + computed rollup) and its tasks. Conductor.
